findings.evidence: `rg` shows the same sequence and implementations: existing file lines 77, 90, 119, 148 define `AmbientIsotopyClass`, `mk_eq_mk_iff`, `lift`, `map`; new file lines 47, 60, 86, 108 repeat that quotient API for `C(X,Y)`.
findings.fix: Add an in-code attribution in the module doc noting that the quotient/lift/map API is adapted from `TauCeti.Geometry.Manifold.SmoothEmbedding.AmbientIsotopyClass`.
findings.issue: The file’s quotient skeleton and theorem order closely follow `TauCeti.Geometry.Manifold.SmoothEmbedding.AmbientIsotopyClass`, but the module doc only credits Burde--Zieschang and the underlying relation/naturality APIs.

summary: The mathematical source and existing ambient-isotopy relation are credited, but the new quotient API closely adapts an existing Tau Ceti formalization without saying so in the code.
